headline: Nvidia To $323? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Thursday
summary: Analyst ratings changed for top Wall Street names. Morgan Stanley cut Carnival Corp price target, Raymond James raised NVIDIA Corp's target and more.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Downgrades CSX to In-Line, Raises Price Target to $41
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Jonathan Chappell   downgrades CSX (NASDAQ:CSX) from Outperform to In-Line and raises the price target from $40 to $41.
